hero_subtitle: SFTY connects wallet risk and transaction monitoring data to help exchanges manage sanctions exposure with clear case workflows and audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Sanctions exposure remains hidden across transactions
problem_description: Exchanges struggle to connect sanctions alerts with on-chain transaction data and wallet risk signals. This disconnection slows risk assessment and complicates audit readiness for sanctions exposure management.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links sanctions alerts with wallet and transaction risk data into one compliance workflow so exchanges can efficiently triage, investigate and document sanctions exposure with full audit evidence.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to sanctions case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals, routes alerts into cases, and preserves evidence to support compliance decisions and regulatory reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. Structured sanctions control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented wallet and transaction risk signals into case workflows with audit-ready evidence and decision logs tailored for sanctions exposure oversight on exchanges.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated exchanges with structured workflows, audit-ready evidence and controlled deployment needed to manage sanctions exposure across transaction monitoring operations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how sanctions exposure is monitored for exchanges
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how transaction monitoring alerts trigger sanctions cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports sanctions exposure reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider orchestration manages sanctions screening risks
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for sanctions exposure monitoring?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects sanctions alerts, wallet risk, transaction data and provider outputs into structured workflows and cases for exchange compliance teams focused on sanctions exposure monitoring.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect sanctions risk signals?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates sanctions, wallet screening and transaction risk from multiple providers, linking them to customers, transactions and cases for comprehensive sanctions exposure visibility.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and supporting evidence to provide an auditable trail suitable for regulatory review and compliance inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY operates as a compliance control layer that connects with existing KYC, KYT, sanctions screening and transaction monitoring systems without requiring replacement.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace sanctions screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY enhances sanctions screening by orchestrating provider outputs into cohesive workflows but does not replace the underlying sanctions screening tools.
final_title: Connect sanctions exposure to audit-ready cases
final_description: Review how SFTY structures wallet and transaction sanctions data into controlled workflows and evidence for exchange compliance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
